column2: arrange(IndividualID, day) %>%  # Sort by ID and Day
length_prev = lag(ForkLength_mm),  # Get the previous Length
day_prev = lag(day),        # Get the previous Day
Growth_Rate = (ForkLength_mm - length_prev) / (day - day_prev)  # Calculate Growth Rate
filter(!is.na(Growth_Rate) & !is.infinite(Growth_Rate))  # Remove NA and infinite growth rates
scatter_g.rate<- ggplot(growth_rate, aes(x = day, y = Growth_Rate, color = as.character(release_group))) +
geom_point(size = 0.5) +  # Use points for individual measurements
geom_density(fill = "blue", alpha = 0.5) +  # Fill color with transparency
